title: Song: My Wish List Glow
objectives: Reinforce present perfect with 'just' through song
Practise travel and exploration vocabulary in a musical context

key_concepts.concept: Song Lyrics — My Wish List Glow
key_concepts.explanation:
Verse 1: I've just added a place to my wish list, / A country I'm excited to see! / I've just found a land on the map so bright, / And it's calling out to me! / I've just learned a word from a new culture, / I've just seen a flag wave free / 'Cause I'm curious, brave, and exploring the world, / And the world is waiting for me!

Verse 2: I've just travelled the globe in my story, / I've just visited every continent! / Asia, Africa, Europe, too / My explorer heart is confident! / I've just learned we all share one planet, / I've just felt so proud and free / Independence grows when I follow my dreams, / And the world belongs to you and me!

teaching_notes: Every line uses 'I've just + past participle' — perfect for drilling the grammar point through repetition. The song covers travel, continents, cultural learning, and independence. Values: curiosity, bravery, shared planet. Good for singing along and discussing: 'What have you just learned?'
